faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers to common questions about jujutsu infinite codes and how they work.

faqItems.question: What do jujutsu infinite codes give you?
faqItems.answer: Most codes give you free Spins, which let you roll for Innate Techniques (special abilities inspired by Jujutsu Kaisen). Some codes also give Yen (in-game currency), XP boosts, or event-exclusive rewards.

faqItems.question: How often are new jujutsu infinite codes released?
faqItems.answer: New codes typically drop during game updates, player count milestones (like 1M visits), holidays, and special events. Check this page daily or follow the official Discord for the fastest updates.

faqItems.question: Do jujutsu infinite codes expire?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Most codes are time-limited and can expire without warning. Some last a few days, others last through an entire update cycle. Always redeem codes as soon as you find them.

faqItems.question: Can I use the same code twice?
faqItems.answer: No. Each code can only be redeemed once per Roblox account. If you see an 'already redeemed' error, it means you have already claimed that code.

faqItems.question: Why is my code not working?
faqItems.answer: The most common reasons are: the code has expired, you already redeemed it, there is a typo or extra space, or the game needs an update. Check our FAQ page for detailed troubleshooting steps.

faqItems.question: Where do I enter codes in Jujutsu Infinite?
faqItems.answer: Open the game, look for the gift box or Twitter/X icon on the side menu, tap it to open the codes panel, paste your code, and hit Redeem. See our redeem guide for step-by-step instructions.

paragraphs: Jujutsu Infinite is a popular Roblox game inspired by the anime Jujutsu Kaisen. Players can unlock powerful Innate Techniques — special abilities like Domain Expansion, Reverse Cursed Technique, and Cursed Speech — by using Spins. Codes are free gifts released by the developers that give you Spins and other rewards without spending Robux.

The most common reward is Spins. Each Spin gives you a random chance to roll a new Innate Technique. Higher-rarity techniques are much harder to get, so every free Spin counts. Some codes also give Yen (the in-game currency used for upgrades), XP boosts for faster leveling, or limited-time event items that are only available during special occasions.

subsections.h3: Why Are Codes Important for New Players?
paragraphs: If you are just starting Jujutsu Infinite, codes are the fastest way to get a strong Innate Technique without grinding. A good Innate can completely change your gameplay experience — some techniques let you dominate in PvP, while others are better for PvE boss fights. Redeeming all active codes on day one gives you the best possible head start.

sections.title: How to Redeem Codes in Jujutsu Infinite

paragraphs: Redeeming codes in Jujutsu Infinite takes less than 30 seconds. Open the game on Roblox, wait for your character to fully load, then look for the gift box icon or Twitter/X icon on the left side of your screen. Tap it to open the codes panel, paste your code exactly as shown, and press the Redeem button. Your reward will appear instantly.

1. Launch Jujutsu Infinite on Roblox (PC, mobile, or Xbox). 2. Wait until your character fully loads into the game world. 3. Find and tap the codes icon on the side menu (gift box or Twitter/X icon). 4. Type or paste the code exactly — codes are case-sensitive. 5. Press the Redeem or Claim button. 6. Check your inventory for the reward.

subsections.h3: Where to Put Codes in Jujutsu Infinite
paragraphs: The code input field is inside the game itself, not on the Roblox website or catalog. Look for a small icon on the left side of your screen after your character loads. If the icon is not visible, try rejoining the server or updating your Roblox app. The codes panel only appears after the game UI is fully loaded.

Always copy and paste codes instead of typing them manually to avoid typos. Make sure there are no extra spaces before or after the code. On mobile, watch out for auto-correct changing your code text. If a code fails on the first try, clear the input field completely and try again. Test a known working code first to make sure your session is connected properly.

sections.title: Why Are Jujutsu Infinite Codes Not Working?

paragraphs: There are four main reasons a jujutsu infinite code might not work: 1) The code has expired — developers can deactivate codes at any time. 2) You already redeemed it on your account — each code is one-time use. 3) There is a typo, extra space, or wrong capitalization. 4) Your game client is outdated and needs an update.
If a code was working yesterday but fails today, it has almost certainly expired. Check the expired codes list on our site to confirm before retrying.

subsections.h3: How Long Do Jujutsu Infinite Codes Last?
paragraphs: Code lifespans vary widely. Some codes last only a few days, especially those tied to specific events or milestones. Others can remain active for weeks or even months. There is no official expiration timer shown in-game, which is why we track and timestamp every code on this site. As a rule of thumb: redeem codes as soon as you find them. Do not save them for later.

sections.title: How to Get More Jujutsu Infinite Codes

paragraphs: The fastest way to find new codes is through official channels. Join the Jujutsu Infinite Discord server for real-time announcements. Follow the developers on Twitter/X and YouTube, where they often drop codes during update reveals and milestone celebrations. You can also join the official Roblox group for group-exclusive codes.

New jujutsu infinite codes are typically released during: game updates and patches, player count milestones (100K visits, 1M visits, etc.), holidays and seasonal events (Christmas, New Year, summer), collaboration events with other Roblox games, and developer live streams or YouTube videos. Major updates almost always come with at least one new code.
Bookmark this page and check back daily. We monitor all official sources and update our code list multiple times per day so you never miss a new drop.

Innate Techniques are the core abilities in Jujutsu Infinite, inspired by cursed techniques from the Jujutsu Kaisen anime. Each technique gives your character unique combat abilities. Some of the most sought-after techniques include Domain Expansion variants, Reverse Cursed Technique for healing, Cursed Speech for crowd control, and Limitless for defensive play. Rarer techniques are significantly more powerful in both PvP and PvE.

Every Spin gives you a random Innate Technique based on a rarity system. Common techniques are easy to get but weaker, while Mythic and Legendary techniques are extremely rare but game-changing. Free Spins from codes let you try for better techniques without spending Robux. The more Spins you have, the better your chances of landing a rare Innate — which is why redeeming every active code matters.
